content.text: I mean... *[small laugh]* ...then why does it feel like this? Like if I'm not doing anything wrong then why am I always three steps behind and forgetting things and -- I went back in the house three times for my keys this morning. Three times. That's not -- that's not normal for me. I used to be really on top of things. I just need to get back to that. I think if I could just push through this month, get past the December thing, then I can actually like... reset. Does that seem realistic?
